title: Implement personal files packs (03f) + macOS packs (03g)
description:
Implement the final two pack categories from plans 03f and 03g.

**Personal files packs (03f)**:
- personal.files: Detect destructive operations on personal paths (~/, Documents, etc.)
- personal.ssh: Detect destructive operations on SSH keys/config
- Create internal/packs/personal/ directory
- Pack registration and keyword integration in defaults

**macOS packs (03g)** (darwin-gated with //go:build darwin):
- macos.communication: Detect destructive operations on Messages, Mail, Contacts databases
- macos.privacy: Detect operations that modify privacy settings, keychain, security policies
- macos.system: Detect system-level destructive operations (defaults write, csrutil, nvram)
- Create internal/packs/macos/ directory

Include: Pack source files, golden file entries, per-pack unit tests, pack registrations, build tag gating for macOS packs.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewed by dcg-reviewer, no issues. Completed in commit e35de9f.
